content: Voice-to-voice latency perception: human turn gap ~200-250ms; <300ms excellent, 300-500ms good/target for production, 500-800ms acceptable but noticeable, >800ms feels delayed, >1500ms broken. 2026 platform benchmarks: Retell ~600ms, Vapi 700-1500ms, Synthflow up to 1800ms. Project's 1.2s budget is upper-acceptable; perceived latency can be masked with instant acknowledgment/fillers and thinking sounds.
